title: Island+
description: A Lunar Client alternative to get better FPS on MCCI!
body: Check the instructions above on how to install this modpack file. **A Modpack made for lower end computers getting low FPS on MCC Island. This modpack will help significantly and you will see FPS coming close to that of 1.8 Minecraft on Lunar Client**. *DISCLAIMER* This modpack is not official for MCC Island, it is just a collection of mods I found that increase FPS on resource pack based servers such as MCC Island and Tubnet. ### Support me:
